# **Looking for a dentist who’ll make you smile?**

Not just with dental care — but through warmth, kindness, and a sense of belonging. All across Canada, our neighbourhood clinics help people feel seen, supported, and genuinely cared for.

Search

Search

[Search my location](https://www.123dentist.com/#)

## Care that goes beyond the checklist.

We offer a full range of dental [services](https://www.123dentist.com/services/) & [technology](https://www.123dentist.com/dental-technology/)

![A smiling father and daughter brush their teeth together, promoting dental hygiene in a joyful family moment. The daughter is enjoying the activity, while the father shares in her excitement. The 123Dentist Smiley adds a cheerful touch to the scene.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/general-dentistry-2.jpg)

### [General Dentistry](https://www.123dentist.com/general-dentistry/)

Regular checkups and cleanings that help keep small issues from turning into bigger ones.

![A stylish woman with glasses admires her reflection in a circular mirror while seated on a smooth stone. She wears a blue outfit and has platinum blonde hair. The 123Dentist Smiley character is visible in the mirror, adding a playful touch to the scene.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cosmetic-dentistry.jpg)

### [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://www.123dentist.com/cosmetic-dentistry/)

Whitening, bonding, veneers — treatments that help you look how you want to feel.

![A cheerful dental scene featuring a smiling patient with curly blue hair relaxing in a dental chair, while a friendly dentist gives a thumbs up. Bright colors and a positive atmosphere convey a welcoming dental experience. The scene also includes the friendly 123Dentist Smiley.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/restorative-dentistry.jpg)

### [Restorative Dentistry](https://www.123dentist.com/restorative-dentistry/)

Fillings, crowns, bridges — whatever’s needed when something breaks or just feels off.

![A cheerful child is playing hockey, sitting on the ice with a hockey stick, wearing a blue helmet and an orange jersey. Next to them is a small hockey goal with a puck in front.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/emergency-dentistry.jpg)

### [Emergency](https://www.123dentist.com/emergency-dentistry/) [Dentistry](https://www.123dentist.com/emergency-dentistry/)

Tooth pain? Swelling? Something urgent? Many clinics can see you the same day.

![A friendly group of four diverse young people is interacting, with one person waving enthusiastically. The 123Dentist Smiley stands out, adding a cheerful touch to the scene.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/orthodontics.jpg)

### [Orthodontics](https://www.123dentist.com/orthodontics/)

Braces or aligners, for kids, teens, and adults. Confidence doesn’t have an age limit.

![A relaxed person sits in a dental chair with headphones, smiling. Above their head, a thought bubble shows a peaceful scene of someone lounging. The 123Dentist Smiley is present, adding a friendly touch to the atmosphere.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/sedation-dentistry-2.jpg)

### [Sedation Dentistry](https://www.123dentist.com/sedation-dentistry/)

If you’re anxious about treatment, you’re not alone. Ask us about ways to make things easier.

![A smiling woman in a blue dress interacts joyfully with a young child holding a teddy bear. The child, with curly blonde hair, appears delighted while the woman playfully holds up a butterfly toy. The scene radiates warmth and happiness.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/guards-and-appliances.jpg)

### [Guards & Appliances](https://www.123dentist.com/guards-appliances/)

Night guards, mouthguards, snore guards — small devices that can make a real difference.

![A friendly dental consultation scene featuring a smiling woman and a dentist engaged in conversation over a tablet. They sit at a table, with dental tools and equipment visible in the background, suggesting a warm and welcoming environment for dental care.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/ai-dentistry.jpg)

### [AI (computer assisted) Dentistry](https://www.123dentist.com/ai-dentistry/)

AI (Artificial intelligence) can help your dentist detect problems quickly and easily.

![A smiling patient sits in a dental chair, pointing at a screen displaying dental teeth illustrations. The setting emphasizes a comfortable dental experience, showcasing modern dental care. The friendly 123Dentist Smiley adds a cheerful touch.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/dental-specialties.jpg)

### [Specialist Treatment](https://www.123dentist.com/dental-specialties/)

Need something more advanced? If your clinic doesn’t offer it, we’ll help you find someone who does.

### Why care feels different here.

#### 1\. Getting started is simple.

Just pick a clinic, book online, and we’ll guide you from there — step by step.

[Find a dentist near you](https://www.123dentist.com/find-your-dentist/)

#### 2\. Care that adapts to you.

If it’s been a while since your last visit, or if you’re feeling unsure — that’s okay. We take things at your pace.

[Explore services](https://www.123dentist.com/services/)

#### 3\. We’re closer than you think.

Our clinics aren’t just in city centers. You’ll find us in suburbs, small towns, and communities across the country.

[Find your nearest clinic](https://www.123dentist.com/find-your-dentist/)

#### 4\. For every stage of life.

From first teeth to dentures, we offer care that fits your life — wherever you are in it.

[Learn more about our care](https://www.123dentist.com/services/)

![](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Smiley.png)

Wesbrook Village Dental Centre

## Payment & insurance made easy.

![An illustration featuring two blue circular faces, known as the 123Dentist Smiley, surrounded by the phrase "Flexible Financing," emphasizing a friendly approach to financial options in dental care. The background is light blue, creating a cheerful and inviting atmosphere.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/flexible-financing.jpg)

### Flexible patient financing

We understand that dental expenses can be significant. 123Dentist Patient Financing offers several financing options to fit all budgets.

[Learn about financing options](https://www.123dentist.com/patient-financing/)

![Logo featuring the phrase "Canadian Dental Care Plan" alongside a white maple leaf on a blue background.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/cdcp.jpg)

### The Canadian Dental Care Plan

The Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP) helps make dental care more accessible for qualifying patients. Find out if you’re eligible and how to apply.

[See if you qualify](https://www.123dentist.com/canadian-dental-care-plan/)

![A friendly blue character, the 123Dentist Smiley, accompanies the text "INSURANCE you're covered!" along with an umbrella illustration, conveying a message of protection and reassurance. The background is light blue, enhancing the cheerful theme.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/insurance-en.png)

### Hassle-free insurance coverage

We work with most dental insurance providers to ensure your treatment is covered whenever possible. Check if your plan is accepted at a 123Dentist clinic near you.

[View insurance information](https://www.123dentist.com/dental-insurance/)

![123Dentist Smiley Face](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Vector.svg)

### Real answers, no judgment.

#### How do I book a dentist near me?

You can search by city or postal code to find a nearby clinic and book online. Or give the clinic a call — whatever’s easier.

[Find a dentist near me](https://www.123dentist.com/find-your-dentist/)

#### Are you accepting new patients?

Most of our clinics are — you can check online or contact them directly to confirm availability.

[Find a dentist accepting new patients](https://www.123dentist.com/find-your-dentist/)

#### Do you accept CDCP (Canadian Dental Care Plan) patients?

Most of our clinics are happy to welcome patients under the Canadian Dental Care Plan (CDCP). Our [CDCP dentist finder](https://www.123dentist.com/canadian-dental-care-plan/cdcp-dentist) page includes an easy filter to display only clinics accepting CDCP patients.

We also have several pages of information about CDCP to help patients learn about and apply for CDCP coverage. [See all of our CDCP FAQs](https://www.123dentist.com/faqs/canadian-dental-care-plan-cdcp-questions/) to learn more.

[Complete CDCP information](https://www.123dentist.com/canadian-dental-care-plan/)

#### What happens at my first appointment?

We usually start with a checkup and a conversation. Your dentist might suggest X-rays or a cleaning, depending on your needs.

[Learn more](https://www.123dentist.com/general-dentistry/comprehensive-oral-exams/)

#### Do you take insurance?

Many of our clinics accept insurance and offer direct billing. It’s a good idea to check with your location in advance.

[Learn more](https://www.123dentist.com/dental-insurance/)

#### Can I get emergency dental care?

Yes — several clinics offer urgent or same-day visits. Search your area or call the front desk to find out what’s available.

[Learn more](https://www.123dentist.com/emergency-dentistry/)

## 123Dentist in your community.

[View all news](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/)

[![A billboard featuring the 123Dentist Smiley alongside text asking about the blue smiley billboards in Ontario and BC. The message emphasizes dental care with the slogan, "We can handle the tooth!" and includes the website URL for 123Dentist.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/blue-smiley-billboard-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/spotted-the-blue-smiley-billboard-discover-whos-behind-it/)

If you’ve been driving around Toronto, walking by the Yonge-Dundas Square or peeking into one of our clinics, you might have spotted a bold smiley face and the words “Smiles Across Canada”. Who’s Behind the Blue Smiley across Canada? It’s 123Dentist! If you’ve been…

[![A woman sits at a table full of various foods, contemplating a choice between unhealthy and healthy options, represented by small figures in red and white dresses. The scene illustrates a decision-making process regarding nutrition and lifestyle.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/angel-devil-woman-food-temptation.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/eat-this-not-that/)

### [Eat This, Not That: The Best & Worst Foods For Your Teeth](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/eat-this-not-that/)

You brush and floss twice a day to keep your smile healthy, but how much thought do you put into the specific types of food that go into your mouth? There are foods that can help to keep your teeth strong and healthy, and…

[![A smiling older woman sits in a dental office, engaging with a dental professional. The setting is bright and welcoming, reflecting a friendly atmosphere. The 123Dentist Smiley adds a cheerful touch to the scene, promoting a positive dental experience.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/older-women-patient-smiling-dental-implant-iStock-1419167275-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/six-reasons-you-need-regular-dental-checkups/)

### [Six Reasons You Need Regular Dental Checkups](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/six-reasons-you-need-regular-dental-checkups/)

Having to visit the dentist every six months may not be the appointment that everyone looks forward to, but it is one of the most important ones to keep. If you have found yourself wondering what the point of having regular dental checkups and…

[![Dental professionals examining a patient in a clinic. Text overlay reads, "Build your career with us."](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/build-your-career-with-us-1-600x328.webp)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/working-at-123dentist-a-word-from-our-employees/)

### [Working at 123Dentist – A word from our Employees](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/working-at-123dentist-a-word-from-our-employees/)

123Dentist offers an incredible work environment for our teams. Here are some kind words from one of our team members about their experience. “If you want a great, fun environment to work in, a place to learn, grow, and feel supported, then 123Dentist could be a great opportunity for you,” says Pauline Wong – Lead Hygienist.

At 123Dentist, we are guided by our mission, vision, and values, including integrity, expertise, and innovation, which influence our culture. This culture ensures that we value our peers as we work together and that our patients always experience top-tier treatment and patient care. This is the 123Difference! Whether you’re entering the job market or you’re an experienced practitioner, we welcome your interest and encourage you to join our team.

Watch our video to hear from a few of our amazing team members across Canada and learn more about working at 123Dentist.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RXI4YVrkYik

[![](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/bc-0038-olympic-village-dentist-09-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/how-your-oral-health-can-impact-your-overall-health/)

### [How Your Oral Health Can Impact Your Overall Health](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/how-your-oral-health-can-impact-your-overall-health/)

The connection between dental health and general health isn’t obvious to most people. However, research shows that oral health has a greater impact on your overall health than you may realize. Taking care of your teeth not only gives you a beautiful smile but it also improves the health of your whole body. If you’re neglecting your teeth, you could be setting yourself up for serious health problems in the future.

[![A dental professional shows a patient a digital screen displaying dental information. Both are wearing masks, and the clinician is using pink gloves. The setting is a modern dental office. The friendly 123Dentist Smiley adds a cheerful touch to the environment.](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/08/tooth-decay-living-in-a-sugar-culture-featured-2025-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/tooth-decay-living-in-a-sugar-culture/)

### [Tooth Decay: Living in a Sugar Culture](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/tooth-decay-living-in-a-sugar-culture/)

We all know that sugary junk food isn’t going to do us any favors for our waistlines, but eating lots of sugar will also rot your teeth and lead to tooth decay. At a 123Dentist practice, we will ensure your teeth feel healthy and can give you strategies to prevent tooth decay.

[![Raising Kids With Good Oral Habits](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/kid-showing-brushed-teeth-1-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/top-parenting-hacks-to-raising-kids-with-good-oral-habits/)

### [Top Parenting Hacks to Raising Kids With Good Oral Habits](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/top-parenting-hacks-to-raising-kids-with-good-oral-habits/)

Whether you just can’t seem to get your children to follow a healthy brushing routine or you’re constantly running out of supplies, raising kids to have good oral habits can feel like an uphill battle. But, you can make life easier by developing and sticking to a dental schedule for your children and learning the most effective ways to teach good dental behavior. Try these parenting hacks to teach your kids how to care for their teeth and why it’s so important.

Create a Dental Schedule for Your Children

The key to practicing long-term dental health and minimizing the likelihood of problems developing is to know when you should take your children to appointments and to do your best to stick to this schedule. These are a few of the milestones for your children’s teeth and when they need to see a dentist:

[![Medical doctor with patient](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/doctor-and-patient-1-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/how-your-general-health-issues-may-impact-your-oral-health/)

### [How Your General Health Issues May Impact Your Oral Health](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/how-your-general-health-issues-may-impact-your-oral-health/)

The connection between general health and oral health has come under the spotlight in recent years. Research shows that poor oral health can put you at risk for health problems like heart disease. On the flip side, your general health can also affect your oral health. Here are six health-related issues that can impact your oral health.

[![Nutrition and Your Oral Health](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/healthy-heart-foods-1-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/nutrition-and-your-oral-health/)

### [Nutrition and Your Oral Health](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/nutrition-and-your-oral-health/)

Nutrition affects your entire body from the inside out. If you’re not eating and drinking the right things on a regular basis, then you’ll be more susceptible to disease and dental problems. Changing your daily diet and oral hygiene habits will improve your overall health and well-being. Here are a few simple steps you can take toward a more nutritious lifestyle that will result in healthier teeth and gums.

Eat More Fruits and Vegetables

Parents around the world tell their kids to eat their fruits and vegetables for good reason. These fresh food items are full of nutrients like vitamins and minerals that are essential for a healthy body. They also have a good amount of water and fibre to balance out the natural sugars they contain. Chewing raw fruits and vegetables, especially crunchy ones, stimulates saliva production to wash away acids and food particles. These things can harm teeth if they stick around for too long in the mouth.

[![Seasonal Snacks That Will Keep Your Smile Healthy](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/healthy-winter-treats-1-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/seasonal-snacks-that-will-keep-your-smile-healthy/)

### [Seasonal Snacks That Will Keep Your Smile Healthy](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/seasonal-snacks-that-will-keep-your-smile-healthy/)

The winter season and its many indoor celebrations can mean you’ll find plenty of tasty snacks around every corner. While those cookies, cakes, and pies look good and taste delicious, they’re not the best choices for your teeth. To help keep your smile healthy this winter, consider reaching for one of these healthier seasonal snack alternatives.

Cheese

The next time you attend a seasonal party, help yourself to some offerings from the cheese tray. Cheese contains a protein called casein, which contains protective properties that can help fight cavities. Cheese also contains high amounts of phosphorus and calcium. These minerals can encourage teeth re-mineralization, which is a natural process that helps prevent cavities. Plus, calcium is necessary for overall bone health.

[![5 Things You Shouldn't Do With Your Teeth](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/teeth-as-bottle-opener-1-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/5-things-you-shouldnt-do-with-your-teeth/)

### [5 Things You Shouldn’t Do With Your Teeth](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/5-things-you-shouldnt-do-with-your-teeth/)

We all know that unhealthy habits are hard to break, but it is possible to do so. Sometimes just knowing what could go wrong can help you stop your current behaviors. The sooner you put an end to harmful dental habits, the safer and healthier you’ll be. If you continue to do some of the worst things with your teeth, then you should expect serious dental problems to arise. Avoid damage, decay, and irritation when you stop doing these five things with your teeth.

[![Healthy School Lunch Ideas for Kids](https://www.123dentist.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/healthy-school-lunch-1-600x328.jpg)](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/4-healthy-school-lunch-ideas-for-kids/)

### [4 Healthy School Lunch Ideas for Kids](https://www.123dentist.com/blog/4-healthy-school-lunch-ideas-for-kids/)

Packing lunches for your kids to take to school can be a fun task, however, it can also be challenging. Constantly trying to think of new and healthy things to pack can be difficult, especially with busy schedules, hectic mornings, and picky eaters. A little planning and inspiration can go a long way toward helping you and your kids pack healthy lunches every day.
